seoTitle: Willmot vs Willoughby — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Willmot and Willoughby. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Willmot and Willoughby.
heading: Willmot vs Willoughby — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Willmot, New South Wales and Willoughby, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Willoughby has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Willmot (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Willmot or Willoughby safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Willmot has a flood risk score of 48/100, while Willoughby scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Willmot scores 47/100 for bushfire risk. Willoughby scores 41/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Willmot or Willoughby?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Willoughby has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
